title: Wear Modulator
description: A datapack that add an item to reset the repair cost.
body:
[
![open_for_commission](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/htqpg9tm66jj27g0gjsbd/comission.png?rlkey=cwfa6r72f8m6fg23jch6ylyi0&st=w3x86wi9&dl=1)
](https://www.fiverr.com/s/gDe5gQb)

## Description
This datapack/mod adds a simple item: the Wear Modulator. You can obtain it by crafting it. When you right-click with the Wear Modulator in your main hand and a tool that has a repair cost of at least 30 levels in your off-hand, it decreases the repair cost to 5 levels.

# The end of unrepairable tools !
![wear_modulator_banner](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/6mscity9ayxj10zs8cwc4/wear_modulator_banner.png?rlkey=r8nu190iws51phmhroj6ng68w&st=h1skw7za&dl=1)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/53NRt15PU1A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### ⚠ WARNING ⚠
- For Fabric version [FabricAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is needed.
- For the datapack version a resource pack is needed.
- Datapack and mod are only translated in english and french.
